revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{rid|}}}{{{lid|}}}{{{kid|}}} |
  {{#if: {{{title|}}}{{{name|}}}{{{2|}}} |<!--
    -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web
         |_exclude=id,pid,rid,lid,kid,units
         |_alias-map=name:title, 2:title, 3:access-date
         |website=Peakbagger.com
         |url={{#if:{{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}
                 | http://www.peakbagger.com/peak.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{if empty|{{{id|}}}|{{{pid|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}
                 | {{#if:{{{kid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/KeyCol.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{{kid|}}}}}
                   | {{#if:{{{rid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/range.aspx?rid={{urlencode:{{{rid|}}}}}
                     | {{#if:{{{lid|}}} | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{units|}}}}}
                       | feet | ft = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=ft
                       | meters | m = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=m
                       | #default = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}
                     }}}}
                   }}
                 }}
               }}
        }}
     | {{citation error|no {{para|name}} specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
       }}
   | {{citation error|no id number specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{rid|}}}{{{lid|}}}{{{kid|}}} |
  {{#if: {{{title|}}}{{{name|}}}{{{2|}}} |<!--
    -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web
         |_exclude=id,pid,rid,lid,kid,units
         |_alias-map=name:title, 2:title, 3:access-date
         |website=Peakbagger.com
         |url={{#if:{{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}
                 | http://www.peakbagger.com/peak.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{if empty|{{{id|}}}|{{{pid|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}
                 | {{#if:{{{kid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/KeyCol.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{{kid|}}}}}
                   | {{#if:{{{rid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/range.aspx?rid={{urlencode:{{{rid|}}}}}
                     | {{#if:{{{lid|}}} | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{units|}}}}}
                       | feet | ft = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=ft
                       | meters | m = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=m
                       | #default = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}
                     }}}}
                   }}
                 }}
               }}
        }}
     | {{citation error|no {{para|name}} specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
       }}
   | {{citation error|no id number specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{rid|}}}{{{lid|}}}{{{kid|}}} |
  {{#if: {{{title|}}}{{{name|}}}{{{2|}}} |<!--

         |_exclude=id,pid,rid,lid,kid,units
         |_alias-map=name:title, 2:title, 3:access-date
         |website=Peakbagger.com
         |url={{#if:{{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}
                 | http://www.peakbagger.com/peak.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{if empty|{{{id|}}}|{{{pid|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}
                 | {{#if:{{{kid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/KeyCol.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{{kid|}}}}}
                   | {{#if:{{{rid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/range.aspx?rid={{urlencode:{{{rid|}}}}}
                     | {{#if:{{{lid|}}} | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{units|}}}}}
                       | feet | ft = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=ft
                       | meters | m = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=m
                       | #default = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{rid|}}}{{{lid|}}}{{{kid|}}} |
  {{#if: {{{title|}}}{{{name|}}}{{{2|}}} |<!--
    -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web
         |_exclude=id,pid,rid,lid,kid,units
         |_alias-map=name:title, 2:title, 3:access-date
         |website=Peakbagger.com
         |url={{#if:{{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}
                 | http://www.peakbagger.com/peak.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{if empty|{{{id|}}}|{{{pid|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}
                 | {{#if:{{{kid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/KeyCol.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{{kid|}}}}}
                   | {{#if:{{{rid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/range.aspx?rid={{urlencode:{{{rid|}}}}}
                     | {{#if:{{{lid|}}} | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{units|}}}}}
                       | feet | ft = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=ft
                       | meters | m = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=m
                       | #default = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}
                     }}}}
                   }}
                 }}
               }}
        }}
     | {{citation error|no {{para|name}} specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
       }}
   | {{citation error|no id number specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{rid|}}}{{{lid|}}}{{{kid|}}} |
  {{#if: {{{title|}}}{{{name|}}}{{{2|}}} |<!--
    -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web
         |_exclude=id,pid,rid,lid,kid,units
         |_alias-map=name:title, 2:title, 3:access-date
         |website=Peakbagger.com
         |url={{#if:{{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}
                 | http://www.peakbagger.com/peak.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{if empty|{{{id|}}}|{{{pid|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}
                 | {{#if:{{{kid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/KeyCol.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{{kid|}}}}}
                   | {{#if:{{{rid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/range.aspx?rid={{urlencode:{{{rid|}}}}}
                     | {{#if:{{{lid|}}} | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{units|}}}}}
                       | feet | ft = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=ft
                       | meters | m = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=m
                       | #default = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}
                     }}}}
                   }}
                 }}
               }}
        }}
     | {{citation error|no {{para|name}} specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
       }}
   | {{citation error|no id number specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{rid|}}}{{{lid|}}}{{{kid|}}} |
  {{#if: {{{title|}}}{{{name|}}}{{{2|}}} |<!--

         |_exclude=id,pid,rid,lid,kid,units
         |_alias-map=name:title, 2:title, 3:access-date
         |website=Peakbagger.com
         |url={{#if:{{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}
                 | http://www.peakbagger.com/peak.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{if empty|{{{id|}}}|{{{pid|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}
                 | {{#if:{{{kid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/KeyCol.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{{kid|}}}}}
                   | {{#if:{{{rid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/range.aspx?rid={{urlencode:{{{rid|}}}}}
                     | {{#if:{{{lid|}}} | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{units|}}}}}
                       | feet | ft = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=ft
                       | meters | m = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=m
                       | #default = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}
                     }}}}
                   }}

     | {{citation error|no {{para|name}} specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{rid|}}}{{{lid|}}}{{{kid|}}} |
  {{#if: {{{title|}}}{{{name|}}}{{{2|}}} |<!--
    -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web
         |_exclude=id,pid,rid,lid,kid,units
         |_alias-map=name:title, 2:title, 3:access-date
         |website=Peakbagger.com
         |url={{#if:{{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}
                 | http://www.peakbagger.com/peak.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{if empty|{{{id|}}}|{{{pid|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}
                 | {{#if:{{{kid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/KeyCol.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{{kid|}}}}}
                   | {{#if:{{{rid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/range.aspx?rid={{urlencode:{{{rid|}}}}}
                     | {{#if:{{{lid|}}} | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{units|}}}}}
                       | feet | ft = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=ft
                       | meters | m = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=m
                       | #default = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}
                     }}}}
                   }}
                 }}
               }}
        }}
     | {{citation error|no {{para|name}} specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
       }}
   | {{citation error|no id number specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{rid|}}}{{{lid|}}}{{{kid|}}} |
  {{#if: {{{title|}}}{{{name|}}}{{{2|}}} |<!--
    -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web
         |_exclude=id,pid,rid,lid,kid,units
         |_alias-map=name:title, 2:title, 3:access-date
         |website=Peakbagger.com
         |url={{#if:{{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}
                 | http://www.peakbagger.com/peak.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{if empty|{{{id|}}}|{{{pid|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}
                 | {{#if:{{{kid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/KeyCol.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{{kid|}}}}}
                   | {{#if:{{{rid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/range.aspx?rid={{urlencode:{{{rid|}}}}}
                     | {{#if:{{{lid|}}} | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{units|}}}}}
                       | feet | ft = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=ft
                       | meters | m = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=m
                       | #default = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}
                     }}}}
                   }}
                 }}
               }}
        }}
     | {{citation error|no {{para|name}} specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
       }}
   | {{citation error|no id number specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_peakbagger here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Cite_peakbagger for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#if: {{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}{{{rid|}}}{{{lid|}}}{{{kid|}}} |
  {{#if: {{{title|}}}{{{name|}}}{{{2|}}} |<!--
    -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=cite web
         |_exclude=id,pid,rid,lid,kid,units
         |_alias-map=name:title, 2:title, 3:access-date
         |website=Peakbagger.com
         |url={{#if:{{{id|}}}{{{pid|}}}{{{1|}}}
                 | http://www.peakbagger.com/peak.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{if empty|{{{id|}}}|{{{pid|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}
                 | {{#if:{{{kid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/KeyCol.aspx?pid={{urlencode:{{{kid|}}}}}
                   | {{#if:{{{rid|}}} | http://www.peakbagger.com/range.aspx?rid={{urlencode:{{{rid|}}}}}
                     | {{#if:{{{lid|}}} | {{#switch:{{lc:{{{units|}}}}}
                       | feet | ft = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=ft
                       | meters | m = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}&u=m
                       | #default = http://www.peakbagger.com/list.aspx?lid={{urlencode:{{{lid|}}}}}
                     }}}}
                   }}
                 }}
               }}
        }}
     | {{citation error|no {{para|name}} specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
       }}
   | {{citation error|no id number specified|cite peakbagger|nocat={{main other||true}}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}

[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
